purpose: Create dry-run proposals for Cloudflare Resource Registry / routing-rule updates without writing registry or production resources.
hard_rules: This proposal stage must not write registry files.
This proposal stage must not mutate Cloudflare, D1, R2, KV, Workers, git, or deployment state.
Unknown resources require proposal and review before registry update.
Examples and required fields are non-exhaustive.
Future resource types must safe-stop into review instead of being ignored.
